content: Updated: 02-03-2026 11:50:40 AM 1. What is the Offer? As part of this offer, customers/users (“Customer”) need to apply for an eligible unsecured loan product from Paisabazaar’s lending partners—banks or NBFCs—through www.Paisabazaar.com and/or its mobile app (collectively “Platform”) or via communication sent through Paisabazaar-owned channels through the entry points where the offer is explicitly mentioned. Once the Eligible Loan is disbursed by the lender, the Customer will be eligible to receive cashback in the PB Wallet, as offered and mentioned in the respective communication. The cashback value will be decided based on the final loan amount disbursed – For loan amounts of greater than or equal to ₹1 Lakh, the customer is eligible for ₹1000 cashback in the PB Wallet. 2. How does the customer get cashback in the PB Wallet? The Customer shall be eligible to receive the cashback in the PB Wallet upon successful disbursal of the Eligible Loan when applied via communication sent by Paisabazaar-owned channels using the specific offer link. The cashback shall be credited to the PB Wallet linked to the mobile number used by the Customer to participate in the offer and through which the disbursement process has been completed. 3. What is the Offer Duration? The offer is valid from 1 February 2026 onwards . The Customer shall be eligible for the cashback in the PB Wallet only if the loan process is initiated and completed within the Offer Period through the entry points where the offer is explicitly mentioned. 4. How and When Will the Customer Be Eligible for the Offer? Upon successful disbursal of the Eligible Loan, applied through Paisabazaar-owned channels, the Customer will be eligible to receive the cashback in the PB Wallet. This will be credited within 45 working days post confirmation of disbursal by the respective lending partner. PRELIMINARY TERMS & CONDITIONS This Offer is being run on the Platform owned and operated by Paisabazaar Marketing and Consulting Pvt. Ltd. (“Paisabazaar”, “We” or “Our”). By participating in this Offer, the user (“Customer”, “You” or “Your”) agrees to be bound by these Terms and Conditions (“T&C”), along with the Terms of Use, Privacy Policy, and other applicable policies available on the Platform. Terms applicable to cashback credited to the PB Wallet, and any future modifications thereto, will also apply. Any lending partner of Paisabazaar is not a sponsor of this Offer. The cashback credited to the PB Wallet is not issued by any third party and is solely facilitated by Paisabazaar. The cashback must be used within 1 year of being credited. It cannot be transferred to another user, exchanged, or redeemed for cash. The cashback can only be utilized for eligible bill payments or services available on the Paisabazaar app. Paisabazaar or its affiliates are not responsible for any loss or misuse of the cashback once credited to the Customer’s PB Wallet. All applicable terms and conditions of the individual loan issui 4. How and When Will the Customer Be Eligible for the Offer? Upon successful disbursal of the Eligible Loan, applied through Paisabazaar-owned channels, the Customer will be eligible to receive the cashback in the PB Wallet. This will be credited within 45 working days post confirmation of disbursal by the respective lending partner.
